titleStmt.title: SII 34.87: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 87. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga II, 3rd year, Simha, sudi 12, Thursday, Śravaṇa = A.D. 1135, August 22, Thursday.

One Īṅgai-uḍaiyāṉ Aḍigaḷ Dēvakaṇātaṉ of Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu gave some land for two lamps. He purchased the land in Kāvērivalla-nallūr the western hamlet of Kāmadavalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and the mahāsabhā of the village made it tax-free without taking tax capital (kāsu koḷḷā iṟaiyili).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmEvaḷara tirupponmātu puṇara nāmEvukalaimakaḷ nalam peritu niṟppa vicaiya māmakaḷ velpuyattiruppa Icaiyuñ celviyumiraṇṭicai
viḷaṅka tirupāvan tiṟaiñca nīṇilamaṭantaiyait tirumaṇampuṇantu cīr pār Aṇimuṭi kavitteṉa maṇimuṭi cūṭi mallai ñālattup pallu
yirellām Ellaiyili Inpam Iyalvinileyti veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟic ceṅkokōlōcci vāḻiyūḻi Ānaṭappa cempon vīrasiṅṅāsaṉat
tup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōrājakēsari panmarāna tiripuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolōttuṅkacōḻatēvarkku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu vikkiramacōḻa vaḷanā
ṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattu brahmatēyam śrīkāmaravalli caruppētimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi māhāsabhaiyōm siṅṅa nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum dvādaśiyum peṟṟa tiruvōṇat
tu nāḷ Uṭaiyār tirukkāṟkōṭīcuvara Uṭaiyār tirumaṇṭapattē kūṭṭa kuṟaivaṟakūṭi Iruntu sabhāvivastai paṇṇina paricāvatu Irājēntira cōḻavaḷanāṭ
ṭu ttu Īṅkaiuṭaiyāṉ Aṭikaḷ tēvakaṇanātaṉ kāmatavallicca
ruppētimaṅkalattu cōḻamātēviccēri Ātanūr pālāśrīyaṉ pāṇṭaṉ mācēna pakkal Ivaṉ vilai koṇṭuṭaiya Ivvūr mēlpiṭākai kāvēri vallava nallūr tirunārāyaṇavatikku mē
Eriyavaiytta tirununtāviḷakku Iraṇṭu Ivviraṇṭukkum Innilam Orumāvāraikkum kācu koḷḷā Iṟaiyiliyāy Innilattāl vanta
t tēvaiyuḷḷaṉa nāṅkaḷē pōkkaṟukka kaṭavōmāka cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka Iṟai tavirttu Ippaṭi cempiluṅ kallilu kācu koḷḷā Iṟaiyiliyāka E
ḻuttu veṭṭikkoḷvatāka Ippaṭi sammatittōm peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyōm Ippaṭikku sabhaiyuḷḷiruntu paṇittār cōḻamātēviccērikku
vanta cīkaṇṭapaṭṭa sōmayāciyār paṇiyālum Avaṉikentarvañcēri muppirāīśvarapaṭṭan paṇiyālum rājakēcariccēri ma lūriyā
ṇṇipaṭṭan paṇiyālum kāmatavalliccēri kūvaṉṉūr Aṉanta nārāyaṇa ran paṇiyālum Ivvūr mattiyastan kāmatavalli Uṭaiyān
Ānantakkani periyānāna mācanappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tōmūr Aṅkumānapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku puḷḷamaṅkalattu vāmanan pōtta paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āttūr koṟṟanam
cēna paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ivai nāṇamaṅkalattu vāsutēvan tattapaṭṭa sōmayāci Eḻuttu Ivai vṛtanār pūvattāri kaṇṭapaṭṭa sōmayāci Eḻuttu Ivai muppirāl Īśvarapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ivai tirunalūr
ṇṭarāṅkani jātavētapaṭṭa sōmayāci Eḻuttu Itu māheśvara rakṣai Itdhanmam rakṣippār śrīpātam Entalaimēliṉa Eḻuttāṇi piṭittār
Digital edition of SII 34.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
